title: H1B Visa
description: Specialty occupation work visa for professional-level jobs requiring at least a bachelor's degree.

timeline.description: Deadline to file full H1B petition

process: Employer registers for H1B lottery during registration period
If selected in lottery, employer files Form I-129 petition
Upon approval, H1B status begins October 1
Cap-gap: OPT/STEM OPT auto-extended until October 1 if selected
requirements: Job must qualify as a 'specialty occupation'
Position requires at minimum a bachelor's degree in a specific field
Applicant must hold the required degree or equivalent
Employer must pay at least the prevailing wage for the position
Employer must file a Labor Condition Application (LCA) with DOL
Annual cap: 65,000 regular + 20,000 U.S. master's exemption
